name: Metabolipidomic profiling reveals an age-related deficiency of skeletal muscle pro-resolving mediators that contributes to maladaptive tissue remodeling
short_name: Aged muscle SPM deficiency and RvD1 repair
summary: A 2021 Aging Cell mouse study profiling aged skeletal-muscle lipid mediators after injury and testing whether systemic RvD1 improves aged muscle recovery.
